id.description: The ID of the custom field.

name.description: The name of the custom field.

type.description: The type of the custom field.

options.description: The options for the custom field if it is a 'select' type.

appId.description: The ID of the app the custom field is associated with.

appLevel.description: Will be true if the custom field is an All Apps custom field. False if the custom field is a customer field, or a field specific to a single app.

showOnCustomerDetail.description: Whether the custom field should be shown on the customer detail page. This can also be toggled by the user.

private.description: If true, your field will only be accessible via the API by your client. If false, all clients can access read the field but only the owning client can mutate it.

filterable.description: If true, the custom field can be used as a filter in the customer list.
